metadata.title: Reklam.biz - Ad Network
metadata.description: Ad placement platform for advertisers and revenue generation for publishers

hero.title: Your Ad Network
hero.subtitle: Advertisers buy ad space, publishers earn revenue by displaying ads on their websites

forAdvertisers.title: For Advertisers
forAdvertisers.description: Create campaigns, target your audience, and grow your brand
forAdvertisers.pricingTypes: Pay per click or per view

forPublishers.title: For Publishers
forPublishers.description: Earn revenue by displaying ads on your website

step1.title: Register
step1.description: Sign up as an advertiser or publisher

step2.title: Setup
step2.description: Create a campaign or add an ad unit to your site

step3.title: Earn
step3.description: Advertisers gain customers, publishers earn revenue

auth.name: Name
auth.walletLoginInfo: Sign in securely with your Kimlik.az account

advertiser.noCampaignsDesc: Create your first campaign to start advertising
advertiser.dailyBudgetHint: Optional. How much to spend per day?
advertiser.pricingCpcDesc: You only pay when someone clicks your ad
advertiser.pricingCpmDesc: You pay for every 1000 times your ad is shown
advertiser.adTitleHint: Optional. If you add a title to image ads, they will show as a rich card.
advertiser.lowBalance: Low balance, top up to run ads

pricing.title: CPC & CPM
pricing.desc: Pay per click or per 1000 impressions. Set your own bids.

analytics.title: Real-time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track impressions, clicks, CTR, and spend in real time.

landing.ctaDesc: Start advertising to thousands of websites in Azerbaijan

publisher.noAdUnitsDesc: Create your first ad unit to start earning
publisher.pageUrlHint: Optional. Which page will show this ad?
publisher.embedCodeDesc: Add this code to your website

landing.revenueShareDesc: Earn {revenueShare}% of all ad revenue generated on your website.
landing.easyIntegrationDesc: Just paste 2 lines of code. Works with any website.
landing.realtimeEarningsDesc: Track impressions, clicks and earnings in your dashboard.
landing.addToWebsite: Add this to your website and start earning
landing.ctaDesc: Join our publisher network and earn from your traffic

help.title: Help Center
help.advertiserA1: Create an account, set up a campaign, define your budget, and upload your ad. Once approved, your ad will be shown on publisher websites.
help.advertiserA2: Two models: Cost Per Click (CPC) - you only pay when someone clicks. Cost Per 1000 Impressions (CPM) - you pay for every 1000 views.
help.advertiserA3: Minimum budget is {minBudget} AZN. You can set a daily limit.
help.publisherA1: Add ad units to your website. You earn when visitors see and click ads. You get {revenueShare}% of the ad revenue.
help.publisherQ3: How do I add the ad code?
help.publisherA3: After creating an ad unit, the embed code is generated automatically. Just paste it into your website.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy explains how Reklam.biz collects, uses, and protects user data.
privacy.dataCollectionDesc: We collect: name, email, phone number (via Kimlik.az), IP address, device type, browser information, and site visit statistics.
privacy.dataUsageDesc: Collected data is used for account management, ad serving, statistics calculation, fraud prevention, and service improvement.
privacy.cookiesDesc: Our platform uses cookies and localStorage for unique visitor identification and session management.
privacy.thirdPartyDesc: We do not sell your data to third parties. Data is only shared with Kimlik.az authorization service.
privacy.contact: For questions about this policy, email info@reklam.biz.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using Reklam.biz, you agree to the following terms.
terms.general1: The platform provides advertising services between advertisers and publishers.
terms.general3: Users are responsible for providing accurate information.
terms.advertiser1: Advertisers may only promote legal products and services.
terms.advertiser2: Misleading, false, or illegal advertising is prohibited.
terms.advertiser3: Payments are deducted automatically from balance. Unspent balance can be refunded.
terms.publisher1: Publishers must not click their own ads (fraud).
terms.publisher4: If fraud is detected, the account will be suspended.
terms.fraudDesc: Generating artificial clicks/impressions, using bots, and any manipulation is strictly prohibited. Detected cases result in immediate account termination.

security.title: Security
security.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
